channel.title: Cymru on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Cymru on Nature Works

item.title: Old gardens at St Fagans
item.description:
There is a wealth of design and plant knowledge to be drawn from historic gardens

I was planning a big blog post but time says otherwise. http://localhost:1313/blog/230717-st-fagans/

item.title: Wild Orchids of Wales
item.description:
My notes from fantastic talk ‘Wild Orchids of Wales’ by Sue Parker, Publicity Officer at Hardy Orchid Society

Great talk by Sue Parker at Llechryd & District Gardening Club. http://localhost:1313/blog/wild-orchids-of-wales/
